title: Modulo_A_Propuesta_Cinematografica
description: Capítulo IV, Sección I, Apartado A — Lineamientos EFICINE Producción enero 2026. Covers scoring categories A1-A11. Total possible: 62 pts artistic + 38 pts viability = 100 pts + 5 bonus.

a1_resumen_ejecutivo_formato_1.description: FORMATO 1. Executive summary of the project. Auto-populated from other modules where possible.

titulo_proyecto.description: CRITICAL: Must be IDENTICAL across every document, every contract, INDAUTOR certificate, and the SHCP online system. Zero tolerance for mismatches.

categoria_director.description: Determines which evaluation group reviews the project. Opera prima <20M and >20M are separate groups; 2nd+ <25M and >25M are separate groups.

duracion_estimada_minutos.description: Must be a feature film (largometraje). EFICINE does not fund shorts.

monto_solicitado_eficine_mxn.description: Cannot exceed $25M MXN (2026 cap) NOR 80% of total cost.

a2_sinopsis.description: Synopsis of the screenplay. MAX 3 cuartillas. NOT 6,200 characters (that limit is FOCINE, not EFICINE).

texto_sinopsis.description: Maximum 3 cuartillas (~2,100 words / ~12,000 characters as upper bound). The Lineamientos say 'extensión máxima de tres cuartillas' — no character count specified.

a3_guion.description: The screenplay itself. User uploads — AI does NOT generate this. Evaluators score: dramatic progression, character coherence, dialogue, structure, originality, theme relevance. Worth 40/100 points.

formato.description: The Lineamientos recommend 'formato profesional que permita establecer de manera clara su relación con el plan de trabajo y el presupuesto propuesto.'

a4_propuesta_creativa_direccion.description: Director's creative vision. MAX 3 cuartillas for ALL categories (fiction, documentary, animation). Worth 12/100 points. PLUS filmography and hyperlinks evaluated separately.

vision_narrativa_y_tecnica.description: How the director plans to realize the film: creative approach, technical choices, language use, coherence with screenplay, actor direction. Max 3 cuartillas.

especificaciones_animacion.description: ONLY for animation: technique description, work stages, collaboration strategy. Included within the 3 cuartillas.

especificaciones_documental.description: ONLY for documentary: approach to participants and community where filming takes place. Included within the 3 cuartillas.

filmografia_direccion.description: Director's prior work in direction. MINIMUM required: Fiction/Doc = 1 feature OR 2 shorts completed. Animation = 1 feature OR 1 short completed. Must include hyperlinks.

enlace_visionado.description: MUST be freely accessible — no password, no email required.

a5_material_visual.description: Visual materials and creative team proposals. MAX 30 cuartillas (NOT 20 — corrected per 2026 Lineamientos). Worth 10/100 points combined with personal creativo proposals.

propuestas_areas_creativas.description: Proposals from: DP, art direction/production design, editing. Also: participants, research, locations, wardrobe, makeup, SFX/VFX, casting proposal, reference images.

disenos_animacion.description: ONLY for animation: character designs, backgrounds, storyboards. Evaluated for aesthetic and narrative capacity.

enlaces_propuestas_audiovisuales.description: Up to 2 hyperlinks to visual/audio proposals. Must be freely accessible.

a6_solidez_equipo_creativo_formato_2.description: FORMATO 2. Team CVs: production, direction, screenwriting, cinematography, art direction/production design, editing. Worth 2/100 points. Evaluates: trajectory in features/shorts/audiovisual, capacity to complete project, national/international circulation, coherence of experience with proposals and budget, prior collaborations.

exhibicion.description: Where exhibited: theaters, festivals (specify), VOD platforms, etc.

a7_propuesta_produccion.description: Production proposal. MAX 3 cuartillas. Worth 12/100 points. Evaluates: producer's creative contribution, work plan solidity, timeline coherence per stage, crew organization, identification of practical and budgetary challenges, commitment to respectful work environment.

compromiso_ambiente_respetuoso.description: MANDATORY: Must include commitment to respectful environment, zero tolerance for abuse/violence. The Lineamientos explicitly evaluate this.

pertinencia_coproduccion_internacional.description: ONLY if international co-production: justify Mexican creative participation, locations, crew. Must distinguish co-production from mere production services.

a8_plan_produccion.description: Shooting schedule + critical path. Combined worth 10/100 points.

a8a_plan_rodaje.description: Day-by-day or week-by-week shooting schedule. Must be congruent with screenplay, dirección proposal, and producción proposal. Evaluates: clarity of day organization, feasibility of assigned time, correspondence with budget.

notas_complejidad.description: Stunts, VFX, water, children, animals, company moves, etc.

a8b_ruta_critica.description: Month-by-month critical path. MUST cover: preproducción, producción (rodaje), postproducción, terminación/copia final, exhibición. Must correspond with dirección/producción proposals and budget. Evaluates: risk anticipation, workflow continuity, integral planning.

a9_presupuesto.description: Budget in three parts + optional quotes. Combined worth 10/100 points. Evaluates: clarity, coherence, viability of financial structure.

a9a_resumen.description: Budget summary by IMCINE standard accounts, in MXN. Must be clear, coherent, and viable.

a9b_desglose.description: Detailed budget by accounts AND sub-accounts, in MXN. Must show pertinence and justification of resource allocation per line item.

tipo_aportacion.description: Must distinguish cash vs. in-kind, congruent with flujo and esquema financiero.

a9_reglas_gasto_eficine.description: EFICINE funds CANNOT be applied to these items. The app must flag any budget line allocated to EFICINE that falls in a prohibited category.

default: Gastos realizados ANTES de obtener el estímulo fiscal
Costos de distribución, difusión o comercialización
Elaboración de la carpeta del proyecto
Servicios que generen ganancia directa para la ERPI (mark-up, completion bond, distributor fees)
Pagos a gestores de recursos por encima del 4% (>$10M) o 5% (≤$10M) del monto EFICINE
Honorarios a personas físicas que SEAN la ERPI
En coprod internacional donde extranjero es mayoritario: gastos administrativos de post (renta oficina, teléfono, luz, agua, internet)

a9d_flujo_efectivo_formato_3.description: FORMATO 3. Cash flow by: accounts × funding sources × production stages. Must reconcile with budget summary.

fuentes_financiamiento.description: Must include ALL contributors from esquema financiero, including EFICINE.

regla_aplicacion_eficine.const: Los recursos EFICINE deben comenzar a aplicarse máximo 20 días hábiles después de la transferencia recibida (Regla 26).

matriz_flujo.description: Each row = budget account. Columns = amount per source per stage. Totals must match a9a_resumen.

a9e_cotizaciones_opcionales.description: Optional strategic quotes for high-impact budget items. Helps evaluators assess cost accuracy.

estrategia_distribucion.description: Distribution/commercialization strategy. Must be coherent with exhibition circuit type.

estrategia_circulacion_cultural.description: How the film contributes to cultural/social identity strengthening.

justificacion.description: Must be coherent with the film's genre and content.

ingresos_o_regalias_estimados_mxn.description: Must be coherent with both the film's genre/content AND the production cost.

ruta_festivales.description: If applicable. Must justify selection: explain relevance to the film's nature, genre, and theme.

a11_puntos_adicionales.description: +5 bonus points. NON-CUMULATIVE — only ONE category can apply. Not evaluated by the CE; verified administratively.

categoria_reclamada.description: a) Female director (not co-directing with a man). b) Indigenous/Afro-Mexican director (not co-directing with non-member). c) Regional: director/producer from outside ZMCM + 75%+ filming outside ZMCM + 50%+ local crew + ERPI domiciled outside ZMCM. d) 100% female OR indigenous/afro-Mexican creative team (producer, screenwriter, DP, art director, editor).

carta_autoadscripcion.description: Required for categories b and d (indigenous/afro-Mexican).

validacion_categoria_d.description: Only evaluated if categoria_reclamada = d_equipo_creativo_100_mujeres_o_indigena. Creative team = producer, screenwriter, DP, art direction, editor. If project doesn't have all 5 roles, post-production roles can substitute (post supervisor, sound design, music composition).
